response.step_by_step_log: I identified the song as 'Tsunagaru Connect' based on the on-screen text at 00:24, which also credited Lyrics: Ayaka Miyake and Music: DECO*27. The performer is Kobo Kanaeru. I searched for 'Tsunagaru Connect Japanese and English lyrics' and confirmed it is a song associated with Rina Tennoji (from Love Live!). I have provided a snippet of the lyrics found. The video contains the song performance from 00:00 to 04:20, followed by a dialogue segment from 04:20 to 04:59.
response.global_summary: The video shows a 3D performance of the song "Tsunagaru Connect" by Kobo Kanaeru. The performance is part of Kobo's 3rd anniversary live event. Kobo performs the song with choreography and background visuals, followed by a short dialogue scene.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs the song 'Tsunagaru Connect'. Song title and credit information (Lyrics: Ayaka Miyake, Music: DECO*27) appear on screen at 00:24. Kobo continues to dance and sing for the remainder of the clip.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: はずむココロ！ 飛ぶようなテンション！ さぁ connect しよ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hazure kokoro! Tobu youna tenshon! Saa connect shiyo!
(My heart is pounding! A tension like I'm flying! Come on, let's connect!)

scenes.description: Post-song dialogue where Kobo talks to the audience about getting her power back.
